title: Cobblemon Future
description: Cobblemon 1.4 with Addons, Datapacks, Vanilla+ and QoL. For Fabric 1.20.1
body:
# Cobblemon Future for Fabric 1.20.1

Enhance your Minecraft journey with the **Cobblemon Future**, a harmonious blend of the familiar vanilla gameplay and the innovative world of Cobblemon.

## Features

- **Cobblemon Core**: Dive into the heart of the modpack with Cobblemon, offering a unique creature collection and battling experience.
- **Quality Add-ons**: Specially selected add-ons complement the Cobblemon core, enriching the game without overwhelming it.
- **Quality of Life Improvements**: Subtle yet impactful tweaks to improve the gameplay experience for all players.
- **Vanilla+ Experience**: All the add-ons and improvements synergize to provide a Vanilla+ experience—enhanced but true to the original Minecraft essence.

![Cobblemons example](https://dotesports.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/cobblemon.jpg) 

Embark on a refreshed adventure that amplifies the thrill without changing what you love about Minecraft.
